news.t: Calamos Revolutionizes Investor Access to Bitcoin, Launching the World's First Bitcoin Laddered Structured Protection ETFs

overview.description: The Calamos Laddered Bitcoin 90 Series Structured Alt Protection ETF (CBXL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that invests in an equal-weighted, laddered portfolio of Calamos Bitcoin Structured Alt Protection ETFs. Each underlying ETF provides capped gains and 90% downside hedge to spot bitcoin (BTC) over a one-year outcome period. CBXL was launched on Oct 14, 2025 and is issued by Calamos.

data.title: Calamos Revolutionizes Investor Access to Bitcoin, Launching the World's First Bitcoin Laddered Structured Protection ETFs
